mano_cua.result_summary: CSS 布局 bug 已确认：mint-field-other 使用 position:absolute;right:0;top:0 相对于 mint-cell-wrapper(position:relative) 定位，input.mint-field-core 设置 width:100%+flex:1 填满容器未预留按钮空间。DevTools 检查确认 input 宽度 1779px 远超视口，mint-field-other 脱离 flex 流绝对定位，输入框区域延伸至按钮下方。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: LAYOUT BUG: The mint-field-other element uses position: absolute; right: 0; top: 0 relative to mint-cell-wrapper, which positions the custom content OUTSIDE the input field's visual area. While this doesn't cause the input text to be hidden behind the button at the current viewport size, it does cause: 1. The custom content to be displaced outside the input field's visual boundary 2. The input field to be wider than intended (no constraint for the button's space) 3. Potential overlap issues at different viewport sizes or with very wide button content
